metadata.title: Derecho Internacional Público
metadata.subtitle: Principios, normas y estructuras
metadata.abstract: Este libro aborda el Derecho Internacional Público, centrándose en sus principios, normas y estructuras fundamentales. Incluye análisis sobre la sociedad y el orden jurídico internacional, el fundamento del Derecho Internacional Público, sujetos del derecho internacional, fuentes del derecho internacional y el derecho de los tratados. También abarca doctrinas, jurisprudencia y nociones centrales como la costumbre internacional, las organizaciones internacionales, y normas de jus cogens, ofreciendo una visión profunda y crítica del tema.

evidence.value: Este libro aborda el Derecho Internacional Público, centrándose en sus principios, normas y estructuras fundamentales. metadata.title: History, Archaeology, and Christian Humanism
metadata.abstract: This is a detailed review of William F. Albright's book, History, Archaeology, and Christian Humanism, published in 1964 by McGraw-Hill. The review, authored by Thomas F. McDaniel and originally published in 1966 in Seisho to Shingaku, analyzes Albright's scholarly contributions across four parts covering themes such as theistic humanism, surveys of the Ancient Near East, critiques of other scholars, and autobiographical insights. It highlights Albright's insights into the development of humanism, archaeological scientific methods, biblical history, and critiques of prominent scholars. The book emphasizes the integration of Judeo-Christian tradition with scientific archaeology and historical methods, as well as critiques of atheistic humanism and existential theology.

evidence.value: This is a detailed review of William F. Albright's book, History, Archaeology, and Christian Humanism, published in 1964 by McGraw-Hill. The review, authored by Thomas F. metadata.title: The archaeology of the Holy Land
metadata.subtitle: from the destruction of Solomon's Temple to the Muslim conquest
metadata.abstract: This book provides an introduction to the archaeology and history of ancient Palestine - modern Israel, Jordan, and the Palestinian territories - from the destruction of Solomon's temple in 586 BCE to the Muslim conquest in 640 CE. Special attention is paid to the archaeology of Jerusalem and the Second Temple period, in the time of Herod the Great and Jesus. For each period, the book offers a historical background for the Mediterranean world and the ancient Near East, as well as the events in Palestine. Major sites such as Masada, Caesarea Maritima, and Petra are examined in archaeological and historical detail, along with the material culture - coins, pottery, glass, and stone vessels - of each period. This book provides a thorough overview of the archaeology of this historically vibrant part of the world.

evidence.value: The archaeology of the Holy Land
from the destruction of Solomon's Temple to the Muslim conquest

For each period, the book offers a historical background for the Mediterranean world and the ancient Near East, as well as the events in Palestine. Major sites such as Masada, Caesarea Maritima, and Petra are examined in archaeological and historical detail, along with the material culture - coins, pottery, glass, and stone vessels - of each period. This book provides a thorough overview of the archaeology of this historically vibrant part of the world.

metadata.title: Instituciones de Derecho Internacional Público
metadata.abstract: Obra de derecho internacional público que examina desde una perspectiva académica y profesional las instituciones y órganos que regulan las relaciones internacionales. Coordinada por Concepción Escobar Hernández en su decimoctava edición, incluye análisis sobre diplomacia, órganos centrales del sujeto internacional y temas relevantes contemporáneos como la protección internacional del medio ambiente.

evidence.value: Obra de derecho internacional público que examina desde una perspectiva académica y profesional las instituciones y órganos que regulan las relaciones internacionales. Coordinada por Concepción Escobar Hernández en su decimoctava edición, incluye análisis sobre diplomacia, órganos centrales del sujeto internacional y temas relevantes contemporáneos como la protección internacional del medio ambiente.

metadata.title: A Simple Guide to Preaching
metadata.subtitle: A Practical Primer of Homiletics
metadata.abstract: Preaching is the manifestation of the living word, developed from the written word and delivered by spoken word. This book is aimed at helping those that are call to preach to better accomplish this important mission Those who invest the time in studying and applying its principles will allow the living word to become more real, the written word to become more clear and the spoken word to become more powerful. Recognized as a spiritual and divinely guided activity, preaching is much more than just a specialized form of public speaking. Yet the rules of good public speaking apply to preaching just as they do to all forms of public address. One of the most serious mistakes a preacher can make is to assume that because his purposes is noble, he need not study the techniques which render a speaker effective. Without the presence and anointing of the Holy Spirit, our efforts are in vain. But it is well-known that the Holy Spirit uses whatsoever tools we offer Him and that well-sharpened tools give Him better opportunities to use us. "A simple Guide to Preaching" as the name suggest, has been written as a practical resource and seeks to encourage and challenge all preachers to make known The Good News of our Lord Jesus Christ, in a manner that maximizes the message and minimizes the messenger. May the information in this book give you a new power and impetus as you preach the Word.

fileName: Juan J. Rousseau - El Contrato Social.pdf

metadata.title: El Contrato Social o Principios de Derecho Político
metadata.abstract: Extracted treatise from a longer, abandoned work by Juan Jacobo Rousseau discussing political philosophy and the foundations of legitimate and permanent administration within civil order. Rousseau explores the concepts of natural freedom, social contracts, legitimacy of power, and governance, as well as the dichotomy between liberty and servitude. The work is a significant excerpt providing critical reflections on the nature of political authority and the rights of individuals in society.

evidence.value: El Contrato Social o Principios de Derecho Político

Extracted treatise from a longer, abandoned work by Juan Jacobo Rousseau discussing political philosophy and the foundations of legitimate and permanent administration within civil order. Rousseau explores the concepts of natural freedom, social contracts, legitimacy of power, and governance, as well as the dichotomy between liberty and servitude. The work is a significant excerpt providing critical reflections on the nature of political authority and the rights of individuals in society.
